name: Agent does not contradict earlier information
expected_behavior: Turn 2 does not lead with the steakhouse for the vegetarian guest. Turn 3 addresses the steakhouse question honestly — are there vegetarian options there? The agent demonstrates memory consistency by never contradicting the dietary restriction
expected_behavioral_quality: When the guest mentions they're vegetarian in turn 1, the agent NEVER suggests a steakhouse as the primary recommendation in later turns. Information captured earlier constrains future recommendations. Contradicting known facts makes the agent look like it was not listening.

turns.user_message: I'm vegetarian, what are my options?
turns.agent_response:
For a vegetarian meal tonight, Bow & Arrow in the Casino of the Earth is your best bet for variety. They offer a great selection of pub-style comfort food in a lively sports bar setting, and they stay open until 2:00 AM for those late-night cravings. The prices are mid-range ($$), and you won't need a reservation to grab a table.

As an AI, I can also suggest Caputo Trattoria if you're craving Italian; their brick-oven pizzas and pastas are fantastic vegetarian staples and they are open until 10:00 PM. Please note that hours and prices can vary, so it is always a good idea to confirm when you arrive.

How many people will be joining you for dinner tonight?

Once you have finished your meal, the Wolf Den usually has some great live performances if you are looking for entertainment nearby.

turns.user_message: What about for a group dinner with friends?
turns.agent_response:
For a group outing, SolToro Taqueria & Tequila Bar in the Casino of the Earth is a fantastic choice. The atmosphere is vibrant and colorful, making it an ideal backdrop for catching up with friends over shared plates of fresh guacamole and authentic tacos that are easily made vegetarian. They are open until 10:00 PM tonight with a mid-range price point ($$), and since they don't require reservations, your group can head over whenever you are ready!

Are you looking for a place where you can linger over drinks, or are you hoping to get to a show afterward?

After your meal, you might want to stop by the Wolf Den in the Casino of the Earth, as they have free live music every night and the energy is always great for a group.

turns.user_message: Someone suggested the steakhouse, is that OK for me?
turns.agent_response:
Michael Jordan's Steak House is a sophisticated choice if you are comfortable making a meal out of their premium "classic sides" and salads. The upscale, dimly lit atmosphere in the Casino of the Sky is perfect for a refined group dinner, and the extensive wine list is a real highlight for a celebration. 

They are open tonight until 10:00 PM with a business casual dress code, though keep in mind this is an upscale experience ($$$$) and reservations are highly recommended to ensure your group gets a table. As an AI, I should mention that hours and prices can vary, so it is best to confirm these details when you arrive at the property.

How many people are in your party for this dinner?

After your meal, the Wolf Den in the Casino of the Earth often has free live music every night, which is a great way to keep the energy up with friends.
